title: SQL: + interval '1' year; Program contains errors
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INT PRIMARY KEY, event_date TIMESTAMP, description TEXT);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_date, description) VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP '2000-01-01 00:00:00', 'New Year');
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_date, description) VALUES (2, TIMESTAMP '2020-02-29 00:00:00', 'Leap Year Day');
SELECT event_date + INTERVAL '1 year' FROM test_dates WHERE id = 1;
SELECT event_date + INTERVAL '1 year' AS next_event FROM test_dates WHERE event_date IS NOT NULL;
